input.prompt: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

data.content: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-11T00:56:27.963Z</current_datetime>

I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

input.initialPrompt: I need a template for creating gRPC services in .NET. Search for available gRPC templates — both installed locally and on NuGet.org. Tell me which package to install.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

data.reasoningText: The user wants to find gRPC templates for .NET. I'll search both locally installed templates and NuGet.org for available gRPC templates.

arguments.description: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new search grpc 2>&1 | head -40", "description": "Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet", "initial_wait": 15}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new list grpc 2>&1", "description": "List locally installed gRPC templates", "initial_wait": 10}

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
These templates matched your input: 'grpc'

Template Name              Short Name  Language  Tags                
-------------------------  ----------  --------  --------------------
ASP.NET Core gRPC Service  grpc        [C#]      Web/gRPC/API/Service
<exited with exit code 0>

toolArgs.description: Search for gRPC templates locally and on NuGet

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
Searching for the templates...
Matches from template source: NuGet.org
These templates matched your input: 'grpc'

Template Name                                         Short Name               Language  Package Name / Owners                              Trusted  Downloads
----------------------------------------------------  -----------------------  --------  -------------------------------------------------  -------  ---------
Clean Architecture DDD Template With Grpc Api         hardcode-ddd-rest        [C#]      HardCode.DomainDriven.Grpc.Template / YanDotnet                40k   
HTL Leonding gRPC API Application                     leogrpcapi               [C#]      HTLLeonding.Utility.Templates / HTL-Leonding          ✓        27k   
Photino Samples HelloPhotinoGrpc                      photinogrpc              [C#]      TryPhotino.VSCode.Project.Templates / Photino                  17k   
[EMG] gRPC Service                                    emg-grpc-service         [C#]      EMG.Templates / emg                                   ✓        16k   
Devon4Net gRPC solution template                      Devon4NetgRPC            [C#]      Devon4Net.Application.Grpc.Template / josemasa                 16k   
Gmox gRPC Mock Server                                 gmox                     F#        Queil.Gmox.Template / queil                                    16k   
ASP.NET gRPC Onion Architecture Solution              oa-sln-aspnet-grpc       [C#]      AHutak.OnionArchitecture.AspNet / agutak                       15k   
Overt.GrpcTemplate.Service                            OvertGrpcTemplate                  Overt.GrpcTemplate.Service / mojinxun                          14k   
Basic client/server solution for gRPC on RaspberryPi  gRPCpi                   [C#]      grpcpi / erikest                                               13k   
Herald Template gRPC                                  herald-grpc              [C#]      Herald.Template.gRPC / tcfialho                                11k   
steos.grpc.service                                    grpcservice              [C#]      steos.grpc.service.template / igorus.kr                         8k   
Overt.GrpcTemplateV3.Service                          OvertGrpcTemplateV3                Overt.GrpcTemplateV3.Service / mojinxun                         6k   
.NET 8 gRPC API Template-CLI                          grpc8                    [C#]      JMI.DotNet8.GRPC.API.Template.CSharp / jonmikeli                4k   
ASP.NET Core gRPC Service (OpenServiceFramework)      osf.grpc                 [C#]      osf.dotnet.templates / OpenServiceFramework                     4k   
Wings GrpcProject                                     WingsGrpcProject         [C#]      Wings.Core.Templates / YahuiWong                                4k   
NetPro gRPC                                           netprogrpc               [C#]      netprogrpc / chaunce                                            3k   
gRPC Service                                          grpcservice              [C#]      ZukoSun.Grpc.Service.Template / ZukoSun                         2k   
Tscc.GrpcServer                                       GrpcServer               [C#]      Tscc.GrpcServer / coolyings                                     2k   
.NET 7 gRPC API Template-CLI                          grpc7                    [C#]      JMI.DotNet7.GRPC.API.Template.CSharp / jonmikeli                1k   
Clean Architecture Procedure Template With Grpc Api   hardcode-procedure-grpc  [C#]      HardCode.Procedure.Grpc.Template / YanDotnet                    1k   
DMediatR gRPC node                                    DMediatRNode             [C#]      DMediatRNodeTemplate / toniarnold                               1k   
.NET 10 gRPC API Template-CLI                         grpc10                   [C#]      JMI.DotNet10.GRPC.API.Template.CSharp / jonmikeli              <1k   
.NET 9 gRPC API Template-CLI                          grpc9                    [C#]      JMI.DotNet9.GRPC.API.Template.CSharp / jonmikeli               <1k   


To use the template, run the following command to install the package:
   dotnet new install [<package>...]
Example:
   dotnet new install HardCode.DomainDriven.Grpc.Template
<exited with exit code 0>

data.content:
You already have the official template installed locally:

- **ASP.NET Core gRPC Service** — short name `grpc`, built-in with the .NET SDK

Create a new project with:
```
dotnet new grpc -o MyGrpcService
```

No additional package installation is needed. This is the standard Microsoft template and is the recommended starting point.

If you need something more opinionated (e.g., clean architecture, onion architecture), the NuGet.org results above show community options — but for most cases the built-in `grpc` template is all you need.
data.reasoningText: The user already has a built-in gRPC template installed locally. Let me summarize.
